samples.xml_description:
```xml
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Chip clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input signal.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input signal.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output signal.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="WIDTH_AIN" value="16"/>
        <constant name="WIDTH_BIN" value="16"/>
        <constant name="WIDTH_YOUT" value="32"/>
        <constant name="SHIFT_COUNT_MAX" value="17"/>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <register id="i" width="5" initial_value="0" description="Shift count register."/>
        <register id="done_r" width="1" initial_value="0" description="Multiplication completion flag register."/>
        <register id="areg" width="16" initial_value="0" description="Multiplicand register."/>
        <register id="breg" width="16" initial_value="0" description="Multiplier register."/>
        <register id="yout_r" width="32" initial_value="0" description="Product register."/>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Shift count register update
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                i <= 0;
            end else if (start && i < SHIFT_COUNT_MAX) begin
                i <= i + 1;
            end else begin
                i <= 0;
            end
        end
        
        // Multiplication completion flag generation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                done_r <= 0;
            end else if (i == SHIFT_COUNT_MAX - 1) begin
                done_r <= 1;
            end else if (i == SHIFT_COUNT_MAX) begin
                done_r <= 0;
            end
        end
        
        // Shift and accumulate operation
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if (!rst_n) begin
                areg <= 0;
                breg <= 0;
                yout_r <= 0;
            end else if (start) begin
                if (i == 0) begin
                    areg <= ain;
                    breg <= bin;
                end else if (i > 0 && i < SHIFT_COUNT_MAX) begin
                    if (areg[i-1]) begin
                        yout_r <= yout_r + (breg << (i-1));
                    end
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Output assignment
        assign yout = yout_r;
        assign done = done_r;
    </implementation>
</module>
```
